title: The Diggerï؟½s Song
content:
آ آ آ آ Scrape the bottom of the hole: gather up the stuff,
آ آ آ آ Fossick in the crannies, lest you leave a grain behind,
آ آ آ آ Just another shovelful and thatï؟½ll be enough,
آ آ آ آ Now weï؟½ll take it to the bank and see what we can find,
آ آ آ آ Give the dish a twirl around,
آ آ آ آ Let the water swirl around,
آ آ آ آ Gently let it circulate, thereï؟½s music in the swish,
آ آ آ آ And the tinkle of the gravel,
آ آ آ آ As the pebbles quickly travel
آ آ آ آ Around in merry circles on the bottom of the dish.

آ آ آ آ Ah, if man could only wash his life, if he only could,
آ آ آ آ Panning off the evil deeds, keeping but the good,
آ آ آ آ What a mighty lot of diggerï؟½s dishes would be sold,
آ آ آ آ Though I fear the heap of tailings would be greater than the gold,
آ آ آ آ Give the dish a twirl around,
آ آ آ آ Let the water swirl around,
آ آ آ آ Manï؟½s the sport of circumstance however he may wish,
آ آ آ آ Fortune! are you there now?
آ آ آ آ Answer to my prayer now,
آ آ آ آ And drop a half ounce nugget in the bottom of the dish.

آ آ آ آ Gently let the water lap, keep the corners dry,
آ آ آ آ Thatï؟½s about the place the gold will generally stay,
آ آ آ آ What was that bright particle that just then caught my eye?
آ آ آ آ I fear me by the look of things ï؟½Twas only yellow clay,
آ آ آ آ Just another twirl around,
آ آ آ آ Let the water swirl around,
آ آ آ آ Thatï؟½s the way we rob the river of its golden fish,
آ آ آ آ Whatï؟½s that? canï؟½t we snare a one?
آ آ آ آ Donï؟½t say that thereï؟½s neï؟½er a one,
آ آ آ آ Bah, thereï؟½s not a colour in the bottom of the dish.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Barcroft Boake represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance, inviting the reader to reflect on the deeper themes of human experience and artistic expression.

In the broader context of Barcroft Boake's bibliography, these specific lines stand out for their clarity and poignancy. Whether you are searching for inspiration or a moment of quiet contemplation, this work offers a timeless perspective that transcends its original era.

At Linespedia, we have curated this specific poem to ensure it reaches a modern audience. We recommend sharing these lines as a digital poster or using them as a thoughtful caption to connect with others who appreciate the enduring beauty of verse.
